nasb.text: ‘Now if a man consecrates his house as holy to the Lord, then the priest shall value it as either good or bad; as the priest values it, so it shall stand.

esv.text: “When a man dedicates his house as a holy gift to the Lord, the priest shall value it as either good or bad; as the priest values it, so it shall stand.

cnv.text: “如果有人把房屋分別為聖獻給耶和華，祭司要按房屋的好壞估價，祭司估價多少，就定它價值多少。

ccb.text: “如果有人把房子献给耶和华，祭司就要评定房子的好坏，祭司估价多少就是多少。
